text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho—a race given extra weight
by the heavy plaque the racers compete over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Fshhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Seriously?! Rain?! On top of all this?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even the weather this year is heavy. More and
more things start to weigh on Mejiro Palmer's
mind...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(The autumn Tenno Sho... The Mejiro family holds
this race in huge esteem, just like the one in the
spring...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: (The track is a mud pit... I'm so not in the mood for a party where they serve nothing but mud pies...)

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Owww... My shoulders are stiff and my legs are,
like, throbbing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(Helios looks pretty wiped from training for
medium-distance races. Her smile looks super
forced...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
So you've come, Teio. Shall we move on to the
second act?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Let's. But this time, I'm taking all the lines. I'll be
the lead and you'll be the one left standing there,
speechless!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(And as for our other opponents... They're star
players born with the weight of their destinies
already on their backs!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Can we really get lit in the middle of all that? Can
we laugh? Can we run?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Can we put our whole hearts into this party?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Of course we can! Who do you think we are?! We
dance to our own beat, yeah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm the black sheep of the Mejiro family, Mejiro
Palmer! And my bestie and I are 'bout to hit the
track so hard, you'll feel it in your souls!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Really, Palmer?! You're going to do that here?! This is not the kind of place for this behavior...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, I like it! She looks like she's having fun! I can
get behind that!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Hey, bestie! ☆ Prepare to be shooketh, 'cause I
just got a wild idea!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Let's make this race all about us today. Whaddya
think?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Make this race... all about us?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I mean, it's all cloudy and no one else
seems to be feelin' it!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So let's come hot out the gate and drop jaws with
a neck-and-neck showdown! You and me! ☆

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
So? Wanna show off? Let's have us a
Helios-Palmer Love Match! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: A love match between just you and me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Let's do it! Let's pump up the vibes to
eleven here on the track, you and me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Watch out, everyone, 'cause we're about to light
it up! Woo!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer puts her whole heart and soul on
display for the audience to see, the way she
wasn't able to do back at the Spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I did it! I really did it! I'm over the biggest hurdle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All riiiight! Let's go show everyone how our
friendship wins over everything!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Their free-spirited roar pierces the rain clouds.
Mejiro Palmer and her bestie, Daitaku Helios,
dance together in the Fuchu rain.
